product_title: Dove Body Wash with Pump Antibacterial For All Skin Types Protects from Dryness 30.6 oz

overall_perception_summary.headline: Reassuring Daily Protection
overall_perception_summary.description: Dove positions its Antibacterial Body Wash as the ultimate safe choice, blending clinical efficacy with its signature gentle care. The brand leverages its immense authority as the '#1 dermatologist recommended brand' to deliver a product that feels like a prescription for daily wellness, not just a cleanser. It operates as a Guardian, promising to eliminate bacteria while actively preventing the dryness associated with harsh soaps, thus fulfilling a dual role of protector and nurturer in the customer's life.

foundation.title: Authoritative Gentle Care
foundation.description: Dove's purpose is rooted in The Guardian territory, using its derm-validated authority to offer scientific protection for daily health. The brand's values prioritize Safety First, sacrificing aggressive potency for gentle, trustworthy formulations backed by transparent 'free-from' claims and PETA certification. This is executed through a Gentle Giant positioning, making its trusted, caring solutions accessible to a mass audience. The payoff for the user is the elimination of risk and anxiety from their daily cleansing routine.

identity.title: The Approachable Expert
identity.description: The brand's personality is a Reliable Expert, communicating with a calm, professional warmth that builds trust without intimidation. Its dominant archetype is The Caregiver (70%), driven by a mission to protect, soothe, and reassure, which is evident in every claim. The visual identity is pure Pharma-Code, using a cool palette of white, blue, and gold to signal clinical safety and efficacy. This is matched by a Gentle Guide tone of voice, which is helpful, supportive, and consistently reassuring.

communication.title: Validation-Led Reassurance
communication.description: The messaging hook is Derm-Validation, leading with its '#1 dermatologist-recommended' status as the primary reason to believe. The brand's USP is as The Specialist, targeting the specific problem of achieving antibacterial cleansing without skin dryness. Its Key Selling Points are all forms of validation, from dermatologist recommendations to PETA-approved vegan status, treating third-party endorsement as the ultimate proof. The communication focus is on Science Education, explaining the 'how' and 'why' behind its gentle, effective formulas.

benefits.title: Confident, Calm Protection
benefits.description: Functionally, the product delivers Protection, shielding the skin from bacteria while actively preventing moisture loss. The core emotional benefit is Relief & Safety, providing the peace of mind that comes from using a trusted, gentle, and effective product. This translates to a self-perception of being a Pragmatist, making a smart, rational choice for their health and well-being. The ultimate social benefit is becoming The Safe Choice, aligning with millions of others who trust Dove for their daily care.

marker_1.slider_a_label: [SLIDER] ORIGIN OF AUTHORITY (The Source of Power)
marker_1.reasoning: Pass 1 (Holistic Hypothesis): The Guardian. Dove's entire brand is built on trusted care and protection. Claims like '#1 dermatologist recommended' and 'eliminates 99% of bacteria' while moisturizing point to a protective, preventative purpose. Pass 2 (Sliders & Grid): Slider A is 2/5 (Derm-Validated) due to the repeated, prominent claim '#1 dermatologist recommended brand'. Slider B is 3/5 (Maintenance) as the product is for daily cleansing and preventing dryness, not fixing a pathology or providing a psychological transformation. The grid maps Low(2) x Mid(3) to Territory 2, The Guardian. Pass 3 (Audit): The holistic hypothesis and grid result are perfectly aligned.
marker_1.evidence: "#1 dermatologist recommended brand" ... "eliminates 99% of bacteria* and gently moisturizes to prevent dry skin." ... "Turn every shower into a serious self-care session with our moisturizing body washes."
marker_1.evidence_src: PRODUCT PAGE (claims) + PRODUCT PAGE (body copy) + HOME PAGE (body copy)

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: The brand's heavy reliance on dermatologist recommendations (A=2/5) for a daily protective product (B=3/5) is a clear fit for The Guardian territory.

marker_2.reasoning: Pass 1 (Holistic Hypothesis): The Earth Saviors. Dove's mission explicitly goes beyond products to social impact: 'redefine beauty standards,' 'help everyone experience beauty and body image positively,' and caring for 'all women, female-identifying and non-binary people.' This is a global, accessible mission. Pass 2 (Sliders & Grid): Slider A is 4/5 (Industry Reform) based on the clear mission to 'redefine beauty standards' and help women 'realise their full potential.' Slider B is 5/5 (Democratic) as the mission is for 'women everywhere' and the brand is mass-market. The grid maps High(4) x High(5) to Territory 3, The Earth Saviors. Pass 3 (Audit): The holistic hypothesis and grid result are aligned.
marker_2.evidence: "We want to redefine beauty standards and help everyone experience beauty and body image positively." ... "help women everywhere develop a positive relationship with the way they look, helping them raise their self-esteem and realise their full potential."

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: The brand's explicit mission to change beauty standards on a global, accessible scale (A=4/5, B=5/5) is a direct match for The Earth Saviors territory, which encompasses social as well as environmental crusades.

marker_3.reasoning: Pass 1 (Holistic Hypothesis): Safety First. Dove consistently prioritizes gentleness and care. Phrases like 'gently moisturizes,' 'prevent dry skin,' and 'No parabens' show a commitment to doing no harm. Pass 2 (Sliders & Grid): Slider A is 2/5 (Gentle). The product is effective ('eliminates 99% of bacteria') but the overwhelming emphasis is on comfort and preventing dryness. Slider B is 2/5 (Evidence-First). The brand provides evidence through claims like 'eliminates 99% of bacteria in a clinical wash test,' dermatologist recommendations, and certifications (PETA, 100% recycled bottle). The grid maps Low(2) x High(2) to Territory 1, Safety First. Pass 3 (Audit): The holistic hypothesis and grid result are aligned.
marker_3.evidence: "gently moisturizes to prevent dry skin" ... "No parabens" ... "PETA Approved Vegan" ... "*eliminates 99% of bacteria in a clinical wash test vs. E.coli"
marker_3.evidence_src: PRODUCT PAGE (body copy) + PRODUCT PAGE (claims) + PRODUCT PAGE (visual territory)

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: The emphasis on gentle effectiveness (A=2/5) backed by clinical and ethical proof (B=2/5) clearly places the brand's values in the Safety First territory.

marker_4.reasoning: Pass 1 (Holistic Hypothesis): The Gentle Giant. Dove is the quintessential mass-market staple. The clean, professional aesthetic combined with its positioning as a daily, trusted product for everyone fits this territory perfectly. Pass 2 (Sliders & Grid): Slider A is 2/5 (Professional). The visual analysis confirms a 'Pharma-Code' look with clean, minimalist design, not sterile but serious and trustworthy. Slider B is 2/5 (Daily Essential). The product is a body wash, available at mass retailers like Walmart and Target, and framed as a daily use item. The grid maps Low(2) x Low(2) to Territory 1 (Medical Authority). Pass 3 (Audit): Diverged. The grid suggests Medical Authority, but the brand's aesthetic, while professional, has a warmth and lifestyle element (homepage 'serious self-care session') that Medical Authority lacks. The holistic override to Gentle Giant is justified because the brand's warmth and mass-market accessibility are stronger signals than pure sterility.
marker_4.evidence: "#1 dermatologist-recommended body wash brand" ... "Turn every shower into a serious self-care session" ... "Available at: Walmart, TARGET, amazonfresh"
marker_4.evidence_src: PRODUCT PAGE (visual territory) + HOME PAGE (body copy) + PRODUCT PAGE (body copy)

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: The grid result was Medical Authority (A=2, B=2). However, Dove's aesthetic, while clean and professional, is not sterile. The brand's messaging about 'self-care' and its broad, warm appeal align better with The Gentle Giant. The override reflects the brand's significant lifestyle and emotional component that a purely medical positioning would miss.

marker_5.reasoning: Pass 1 (Holistic Hypothesis): The Reliable Expert. Dove's personality is built on trust and authority. It speaks with the calm confidence of a specialist ('#1 dermatologist recommended') but maintains a professional distance. Pass 2 (Sliders & Grid): Slider A is 2/5 (Distant). The tone is polite and caring ('gently moisturizes') but lacks effusive warmth or affection; it's professional care. Slider B is 4/5 (The Specialist). The authority is high, derived from dermatologist recommendations and clinical test data, positioning the brand as a highly educated source. The grid maps Low(2) x High(4) to Territory 3, The Reliable Expert. Pass 3 (Audit): The holistic hypothesis and grid result are aligned.
marker_5.evidence: "As the #1 dermatologist-recommended body wash brand, caring for your skin is our top priority." ... "That's why this body wash is free from harsh sulfates and is formulated with our Moisture Renew Blend™"

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: The combination of professional, restrained warmth (A=2/5) and high, specialist authority (B=4/5) is a direct fit for The Reliable Expert.

marker_6.reasoning: The primary archetype is The Caregiver (70%), driven by the core promise to protect, soothe, and provide gentle care ('gently moisturizes to prevent dry skin,' 'caring for your skin is our top priority'). The Sage (20%) is secondary, appearing through the educational tone and evidence-based claims ('eliminates 99% of bacteria in a clinical wash test,' 'formulated with our Moisture Renew Blend™'). The Everyman (10%) is a tertiary accent, reflected in the mass-market accessibility and mission to care for 'everyone.' The territory is The Guardian, as The Caregiver is the dominant archetype native to this quadrant. The mix of protection, education, and accessibility defines Dove's guardian role.
marker_6.evidence: "'When it comes to care, we want to give you products you can trust' (Caregiver)... 'eliminates 99% of bacteria in a clinical wash test vs. E.coli' (Sage)... 'We care about all women, female-identifying and non-binary people.' (Everyman)
marker_6.evidence_src: ABOUT PAGE + PRODUCT PAGE (visual territory) + ABOUT PAGE

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: Cross-validation: ToV is Territory 3 (Gentle Guide), which expects Everyman or Caregiver. VI is Territory 1 (Pharma-Code), which expects Sage, Ruler, or Caregiver. The primary archetype, The Caregiver, appears in both coherence tables, confirming the selection is aligned with the observed tone and visuals.

marker_7.reasoning: Pass 1 (Holistic Hypothesis): The Gentle Guide. The copy is consistently helpful, positive, and supportive without being overly formal or excessively enthusiastic. Pass 2 (Sliders & Grid): Humor is 2/5 (Serious), there are no jokes. Formality is 3/5 (Professional), using standard, clean language. Respect is 2/5 (Respectful) and polite. Enthusiasm is 3/5 (Helpful), with encouraging but measured language like 'leaves you feeling gently cleansed and cared for'. Applying the hard rules: Rule 1 (Clinical) fails as Enthusiasm is 3. Rule 2 (Hype Beast) fails as Enthusiasm is not >=4. Rule 3 (Gentle Guide) matches: E=3, F=3, H=2, R=2 are all within its bounds. The territory is 3. Pass 3 (Audit): Aligned.
marker_7.evidence: "Reach for this non-drying body wash to instantly invigorate and reboot your senses." ... "Its bright citrus scent leaves you feeling gently cleansed and cared for from head to toe"

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: The slider scores (H=2, F=3, R=2, E=3) perfectly match the criteria for Rule 3, The Gentle Guide, which is the first matching rule in the sequence.

marker_8.reasoning: Pass 1 (Holistic Hypothesis): Pharma-Code. The visual analysis across all pages consistently points to a clinical, clean, and professional aesthetic dominated by white, blue, and gold. Pass 2 (Sliders & Grid): The provided PDP Marker 8 analysis is used as the reference. Slider A is 2/5 (Cool) based on the dominant white, blue, and teal palette. Slider B is 2/5 (Structured) due to the clean, centered-single product shots and orderly layouts. The grid maps Low(2) x Low(2) to Territory 1, Pharma-Code. Pass 3 (Audit): The holistic hypothesis and the grid result (informed by the PDP reference) are perfectly aligned.
marker_8.evidence: "The viewport presents a clean, organized layout with a cool-toned UI shell... conveying a sense of clinical professionalism." ... "The dominant white and cool teal evoke a sense of cleanliness, freshness, and clinical effectiveness."
marker_8.evidence_src: PRODUCT PAGE (visual territory) + PRODUCT GALLERY (visual analysis)
marker_8.look_and_feel: A clean, minimalist aesthetic with a cool-toned palette, featuring the iconic white bottle against sterile white backgrounds to communicate hygiene, safety, and gentle efficacy.
marker_8.distinctive_asset_5: PETA-Approved Vegan and Dermatologist Recommended badges
marker_8.primary_palette: A clean and fresh palette of white and light blue, accented with a touch of golden yellow, communicates purity, gentleness, and a premium, trustworthy feel.

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: Adopting the PDP Marker 8 reference territory. The WWW gallery is visually identical to the PDP source. Cool temperature (2/5) and Structured layout (2/5) map directly to the Pharma-Code territory, confirming the reference.

marker_9.reasoning: Pass 1 (Holistic Hypothesis): The Problem Solver. The messaging is squarely focused on solving the problem of bacteria on the skin without causing dryness. Pass 2 (Sliders & Grid): Slider A is 4/5 (The Result). The primary hooks are effects: 'eliminates 99% of bacteria' and 'moisturizes to prevent dry skin.' Slider B is 2/5 (Rational). The persuasion is logical: it cleanses effectively (backed by a clinical test) and moisturizes (with Moisture Renew Blend™). The grid maps High(4) x Low(2) to Territory 2, The Problem Solver. Pass 3 (Audit): The holistic hypothesis and grid result are aligned.
marker_9.evidence: "This antibacterial body wash eliminates 99% of bacteria* and gently moisturizes to prevent dry skin." ... "banish bacteria*, keep skin soft!"
marker_9.evidence_src: PRODUCT PAGE (body copy) + PRODUCT GALLERY (visible text)

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: The messaging leads with the result (A=4/5) and uses a rational argument (B=2/5), which is a direct match for The Problem Solver territory.

marker_10.reasoning: Pass 1 (Holistic Hypothesis): The Lab Breakthrough. The narrative is one of institutional science and research. There is no founder story, only the authority of dermatologists and clinical tests. Pass 2 (Sliders & Grid): Slider A is 1/5 (The Nobel). The authority comes from the faceless, institutional 'dermatologist' community, not a named founder. Slider B is 1/5 (Sterile). The setting is implied to be a lab, with 'clinical wash test' and formulations like 'Moisture Renew Blend™' suggesting a scientific, sterile origin. The grid maps Low(1) x Low(1) to Territory 1, The Lab Breakthrough. Pass 3 (Audit): The holistic hypothesis and grid result are aligned.
marker_10.evidence: "#1 dermatologist-recommended body wash brand" ... "formulated with our Moisture Renew Blend™" ... "*eliminates 99% of bacteria in a clinical wash test vs. E.coli"
marker_10.evidence_src: PRODUCT PAGE (visual territory) + PRODUCT PAGE (body copy)

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: The narrative relies on institutional scientific authority (A=1/5) from a clinical setting (B=1/5), which is a perfect fit for The Lab Breakthrough.

marker_11.slider_b_position_name: The Stat ('95% saw reduction in acne')
marker_11.reasoning: Pass 1 (Holistic Hypothesis): Derm-Validation. The most repeated and prominent Key Selling Point is the '#1 dermatologist recommended' claim. This is the core of their proof strategy. Pass 2 (Sliders & Grid): Slider A is 1/5 (The Board). The ultimate validator is the dermatologist community. Slider B is 2/5 (The Stat). The proof is presented as a hard statistic: 'eliminates 99% of bacteria'. The grid maps Low(1) x Low(2) to Territory 1, Derm-Validation. Pass 3 (Audit): The holistic hypothesis and grid result are aligned.
marker_11.evidence: "#1 dermatologist recommended brand" ... "eliminates 99% of bacteria*" ... "PETA Approved Vegan"

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: The combination of dermatologist authority (A=1/5) and statistical proof (B=2/5) is the definition of the Derm-Validation territory.

marker_12.slider_a_label: [SLIDER] THE OWNERSHIP CLAIM (What Makes You Unique)
marker_12.slider_b_position_name: The Problem Solver (Targets specific skin concern)
marker_12.reasoning: Pass 1 (Holistic Hypothesis): The Specialist. This specific product's unique selling proposition is solving the niche problem of needing antibacterial cleansing without the typical drying effect. Pass 2 (Sliders & Grid): Slider A is 3/5 (The Signature Complex). The uniqueness comes from the trademarked 'Moisture Renew Blend™' combined with the antibacterial formulation. Slider B is 4/5 (The Problem Solver). The product is explicitly targeted at the problem of bacteria on the body and the associated risk of dry skin. The grid maps Any(A) x Niche(4) to Territory 4, The Specialist. Pass 3 (Audit): The holistic hypothesis and grid result are aligned.
marker_12.evidence: "eliminate 99% of bacteria* while shielding your skin from dryness" ... "formulated with our Moisture Renew Blend™ – to help prevent dry skin with round-the-clock hydration."
marker_12.evidence_src: PRODUCT GALLERY (visible text) + PRODUCT PAGE (body copy)

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: The product's focus on solving the specific problem of antibacterial cleansing without dryness (B=4/5) makes it a Specialist, regardless of the ownership claim type.

marker_13.reasoning: Pass 1 (Holistic Hypothesis): Science Education. The content focus is on explaining how the product works ('Moisture Renew Blend™') and proving its efficacy through clinical tests and dermatologist recommendations. Pass 2 (Sliders & Grid): Slider A is 2/5 (The Explainer). The page explains the technology ('millions of MicroMoisture droplets, that absorb deeply') and benefits. Slider B is 1/5 (The Thesis). The intent is to build trust through credibility signals like 'clinical wash test' and '#1 dermatologist recommended'. The grid maps Low(2) x Low(1) to Territory 1, Science Education. Pass 3 (Audit): The holistic hypothesis and grid result are aligned.
marker_13.evidence: "millions of MicroMoisture droplets, that absorb deeply" ... "*eliminates 99% of bacteria in a clinical wash test vs. E.coli" ... "#1 dermatologist-recommended body wash brand"
marker_13.evidence_src: PRODUCT GALLERY (visible text) + PRODUCT PAGE (visual territory) + PRODUCT PAGE (body copy)

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: The focus on explaining the science (A=2/5) to build trust and prove credibility (B=1/5) is a clear fit for the Science Education territory.

marker_14.reasoning: Pass 1 (Holistic Hypothesis): Protection. The primary function is to protect the skin from bacteria while also protecting it from dryness. It's a dual-shield action. Pass 2 (Sliders & Grid): Slider A is 2/5 (The Buffer). It's not just a passive shield; it actively works to 'prevent dry skin' and support the moisture barrier, which is a proactive support mechanism. Slider B is 2/5 (Sensory). The outcome is about how the skin feels: 'keep skin soft,' preventing the feeling of tightness. The grid maps Low(2) x Low(2) to Territory 2, Protection. Pass 3 (Audit): The holistic hypothesis and grid result are aligned.
marker_14.evidence: "eliminates 99% of bacteria* while shielding your skin from dryness" ... "gently moisturizes to prevent dry skin." ... "keep skin soft!"
marker_14.evidence_src: PRODUCT GALLERY (visible text) + PRODUCT PAGE (body copy)

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: The mechanism of proactively supporting the skin's moisture barrier (A=2/5) to achieve a sensory benefit of softness (B=2/5) falls squarely into the Protection territory.

marker_15.slider_b_position_name: Sanctuary (I feel safe inside my own body)
marker_15.reasoning: Pass 1 (Holistic Hypothesis): Relief / Safety. The emotional benefit is the peace of mind that comes from knowing you are clean and protected without harming your skin. It's about feeling safe. Pass 2 (Sliders & Grid): Slider A is 2/5 (Reassurance). The '#1 dermatologist recommended' claim is pure reassurance, calming anxiety about product choice. Slider B is 1/5 (Sanctuary). The benefit is feeling safe and cared for in your own skin, a private comfort. The grid maps Low(2) x Low(1) to Territory 1, Relief / Safety. Pass 3 (Audit): The holistic hypothesis and grid result are aligned.
marker_15.evidence: "When it comes to care, we want to give you products you can trust for your skin and hair." ... "beauty should be a source of confidence, and not anxiety."

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: The emotional direction of reassurance (A=2/5) combined with the internal feeling of safety (B=1/5) is a direct match for the Relief / Safety territory.

marker_16.slider_a_position_name: The Smart Choice (because it makes sense)
marker_16.slider_b_position_name: The Standard (What everyone uses; the default)
marker_16.reasoning: Pass 1 (Holistic Hypothesis): The Pragmatist. Choosing Dove is a rational, smart decision based on its reputation, dermatologist recommendations, and effectiveness. It's not an identity statement but a practical choice. Pass 2 (Sliders & Grid): Slider A is 2/5 (The Smart Choice). The purchase is motivated by logic: it's recommended by doctors and it works. Slider B is 1/5 (The Standard). As the '#1 dermatologist-recommended brand,' it is positioned as the default, standard choice for body wash. The grid maps Low(2) x Low(1) to Territory 1, The Pragmatist. Pass 3 (Audit): The holistic hypothesis and grid result are aligned.
marker_16.evidence: "#1 dermatologist recommended brand" ... "caring for your skin is our top priority" ... "a deep cleanse at the end of the day"

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: The motivation is rational (A=2/5) and the brand's social position is the mass-market standard (B=1/5), which defines The Pragmatist.

marker_17.slider_a_position_name: Normalization ('I want to look like everyone else')
marker_17.reasoning: Pass 1 (Holistic Hypothesis): The Safe Choice. The social benefit of using Dove is belonging to the massive group of people who make the sensible, doctor-approved choice. There is safety in numbers. Pass 2 (Sliders & Grid): Slider A is 1/5 (Normalization). Using the #1 recommended brand is an act of conforming to the safest, most normal standard of care. Slider B is 1/5 (The Majority). The brand explicitly appeals to the majority through its mass-market presence and #1 status. The grid maps Low(1) x Low(1) to Territory 1, The Safe Choice. Pass 3 (Audit): The holistic hypothesis and grid result are aligned.
marker_17.evidence: "#1 dermatologist-recommended body wash brand" ... "we're proud to say that our PETA-Approved Vegan body wash is packaged in a 100% recyclable bottle."

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: The social goal is assimilation (A=1/5) into the majority (B=1/5), which is the definition of The Safe Choice territory.
